docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.
